children.heading: In general
children.label: 1 In general
children.text: Within the 60-day period immediately preceding the effective date of an order, as provided in , the Secretary shall conduct a referendum among processors who, during a representative period as determined by the Secretary, have been engaged in processing, for the purpose of ascertaining whether the order shall go into effect.section 7483(b)(3) of this title

children.heading: Approval of order
children.label: 2 Approval of order
children.text: The order shall become effective, as provided in , only if the Secretary determines that the order has been approved by not less than a majority of the processors voting in the referendum and if the majority processed more than 50 percent of the popcorn certified as having been processed, during the representative period, by the processors voting.section 7483(b) of this title

children.heading: In general
children.label: 1 In general
children.text: Not earlier than 3 years after the effective date of an order approved under subsection (a), on the request of the Board or a representative group of processors, as described in paragraph (2), the Secretary may conduct additional referenda to determine whether processors favor the suspension or termination of the order.

children.heading: Representative group of processors
children.label: 2 Representative group of processors
children.text: An additional referendum on an order shall be conducted if the referendum is requested by 30 percent or more of the number of processors who, during a representative period as determined by the Secretary, have been engaged in processing.

children.label: A
children.text: suspend or terminate, as appropriate, collection of assessments under the order not later than 180 days after the date of determination; and

children.label: B
children.text: suspend or terminate the order, as appropriate, in an orderly manner as soon as practicable after the date of determination.

children.heading: Costs of referendum
children.label: c Costs of referendum
children.text: The Secretary shall be reimbursed from assessments collected by the Board for any expenses incurred by the Secretary in connection with the conduct of any referendum under this section.

children.heading: Method of conducting referendum
children.label: d Method of conducting referendum
children.text: Subject to this section, a referendum conducted under this section shall be conducted in such manner as is determined by the Secretary.

children.heading: Confidentiality of ballots and other information
children.label: e Confidentiality of ballots and other information

children.heading: In general
children.label: 1 In general
children.text: The ballots and other information or reports that reveal or tend to reveal the vote of any processor, or any business operation of a processor, shall be considered to be strictly confidential and shall not be disclosed.

children.heading: Penalty for violations
children.label: 2 Penalty for violations
children.text: An officer or employee of the Department who knowingly violates paragraph (1) shall be subject to the penalties described in .section 7484(i)(3)(C)(ii) of this title
